meaning: n.(含有黏土、沙以及有机物质的)肥土vt.用肥土填
examples: Loam is a soil with roughly equal proportions of clay, sand and silt.
The soils are primarily silty loam.
Add mature compost to existing garden loam.
Little says that he learns something every year and that his sandy loam is better suited than most soils to the practice.
The soil consists of a chalk subsoil, topped by a covering of rubble that is made up of sand, lignite, marl, loam and clay.
